title: Nee Iralu Jotheyalli
subTitle: The machinations of fate bring the unlikely pair Rachana and Krishna together. Meanwhile, their bond tries to survive Urmila's wrath.

title: Anupama-Sarvagunaa Sampanne
subTitle: Anupamaa and Anuj make the difficult decision to go their separate ways. However, six months later, Anupamaa begins a new journey at Asha Bhavan.

title: Anupama-Sarvagunaa Sampanne
subTitle: Anupamaa is entranced by the sweet sound of a flute player with a long beard. Later, believing it to be Anuj, her curiosity leads her to approach the mysterious musician.

title: Ninna Jothe Nanna Kathe
subTitle: After Bhoomi and Ajith tie the knot out of convenience, they strive to build a bond and draw strength from each other in tough situations.

title: Vasudeva Kutumba
subTitle: The familiar routines of Swati and her family crumble when her father passes away. Amid financial issues, betrayal and hurdles of responsibility, Swati must rebuild the family.

title: Udho Udho Shri Renuka Yellamma
subTitle: A scheme is hatched by Karthaveerarjuna to capture Kamadhenu from the Ashram. The plan hits a snag when Varuna rejects the order to stand against Renuka and the sacred cow.

title: Jai Lalitha
subTitle: With her quick wit and visionary approach, Lalitha becomes the village head. However, the real challenge arises when she is confronted with family politics.

title: Aase
subTitle: The lives of two ordinary people, Surya and Meena, collide. While the former is aimless with no hope in life, the latter smiles through adversities and makes sacrifices for her family's happiness.

subTitle: Anupamaa cautions Kinjal against repeating her own mistakes and urges her to maintain her respect in the family. However, Anupamaa engages in a heated argument with Paritosh.

title: Anupama-Sarvagunaa Sampanne
subTitle: Anupamaa, who parts with her ambitions and goals in a bid to raise her family, feels dejected when she fails to get any credit for her sacrifices and trials. She then decides to live on her own terms.

subTitle: Chandrakala, a beautiful young woman, is betrayed by her NRI husband, leaving her distraught. However, things become complicated when even her family rejects her, forcing her to build her life alone.
